description: Routing corpus — does a phrase route to adia-ui-llm (the @adia-ai/llm PRODUCER/maintainer skill) or to a sibling / the consumer-side skill / off-topic? The producer/consumer split is the sharpest boundary: MAINTAINING the client is here; WIRING it into an app is the adia-ui-factory consumer skill.

phrases.phrase: add a new LLM provider adapter to @adia-ai/llm
fix the SSE parser in the anthropic adapter
the anthropic adapter drops cache_read tokens in parseResponse
add a model to the MODELS registry and the detectProvider branch
streamChat yields a malformed StreamChunk near the end
change the ChatResult shape returned by chat()
why does the browser get a 401 but node works — passthrough vs smart proxy
stopReason is being normalized to end and hiding truncation
the StubLLMAdapter returns the wrong A2UI JSON
createAdapter returns the stub even though a key is set
the gemini adapter builds the wrong streamGenerateContent URL
lower the maxTokens default in the bridge
openai finish_reason length should propagate raw as truncation
make sure adia-ui-llm knows about a new provider's caching mechanism
wire @adia-ai/llm into my chat box with a chat-shell-ui
what proxy should I deploy to keep my API key off the browser
generate a dashboard UI from this intent
add a slot to button-ui and update its yaml contract
cut a release and bump the @adia-ai/llm version tag
explain how server-sent events work in general
